# freeipa_hostgroup (Data Source)

Reads details of a FreeIPA hostgroup.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the hostgroup (cn).

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the hostgroup.
- `hosts` (Set of String) Set of host FQDNs belonging to this hostgroup.
- `id` (String) Unique name of the hostgroup.
